overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character walking along a rain-soaked suburban sidewalk at night. Heavy rainfall creates reflective wet surfaces under street lighting, with palm trees lining the street and occasional pedestrians carrying umbrellas. The scene has a dark, atmospheric cinematic quality typical of modern game engines.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, rain-soaked suburban sidewalk lined with palm trees and hedges. A red sedan is parked along the left curb while the camera follows a pedestrian with a white umbrella walking ahead. Street lamps cast reflections on the wet concrete as heavy rain continues to fall.

events.description: passing a pedestrian in a striped dress walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk and passing an oncoming pedestrian

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past large palm tree trunks lining the sidewalk and encounters a woman in a striped dress walking in the opposite direction. The hedge row recedes behind as the path continues through the residential area, with street lamps now appearing closer on the left.

events.description: sidewalk opens up approaching an intersection with visible crosswalk

agents.ego_description: approaching the corner of the intersection while following the pedestrian ahead

entered.detail: corner of the intersection where the sidewalk meets the cross street
white painted lines marking the pedestrian crossing ahead

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the camera approaches a street intersection, with the sidewalk widening to reveal crosswalk markings and the corner ahead. The dense tree cover gives way to a more open view of the intersecting road, while street lamps appear closer and the residential facades fade from view behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked suburban sidewalk that gradually opens from a sheltered residential path into a wide street intersection. It begins by following a pedestrian with a white umbrella past a parked red sedan, where street lamps cast shimmering reflections on the wet concrete beneath a canopy of palm trees. As the camera moves forward, it passes a woman in a striped dress walking in the opposite direction while the bordering hedges begin to recede. The scene then expands as the dense tree cover gives way to a more open view, with the sidewalk widening to reveal white crosswalk markings. Finally, the residential facades fade into the background as the camera reaches the corner of the intersecting road under the glow of nearby street lamps.
